mapper.update: UPDATE TB_UPLD_FILE SET DEL_YN = 'Y', USE_YN = 'N', UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd}, UPD_DTM = SYSDATE() WHERE UPLD_FILE_CD = #{upldFileCd} AND FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT UPLD_FILE_CD , FILE_SEQ , FILE_NM , SAVE_FILE_NM , SAVE_PATH FROM TB_UPLD_FILE WHERE UPLD_FILE_CD = #{upldFileCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY FILE_SEQ ASC
SELECT UPLD_FILE_CD , FILE_SEQ , FILE_NM , SAVE_FILE_NM , SAVE_PATH FROM TB_UPLD_FILE WHERE UPLD_FILE_CD = #{upldFileCd} AND FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
